name: Keycard
oneliner: AI-native identity and access management platform that uses cryptography to verify agent identity, enforce delegation chains, and provide audit trails for every agent action.
finserv: No explicit finserv customer evidence at launch; ecommerce named as primary beachhead. Angels include Auth0, Okta, Datadog identity veterans who typically serve regulated enterprises.
team: Ian Livingstone (serial founder). Angels: Karl McGuinness (ex-Okta), Matias Woloski (Auth0 co-founder), Emilio Escobar (Datadog), Ian Andrews (Groq). Led by a16z and boldstart ventures, Series A by Acrew Capital.
thesis: Keycard is the most technically precise agent identity solution in the pipeline — cryptographic short-term identity binding tokens, revocable delegation chains, per-task policy enforcement, full audit logs. The Auth0/Okta founding network built the last identity standards layer; they are likely to build the next one.
evidence: AI agent security startup Keycard reels in $38M
